description_long: This kiosk is a barrel-shaped structure with a cylindrical wooden body mounted on a rectangular concrete base. The exterior is clad in horizontally laid, weathered blue-gray wooden planks, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The interior is divided into two main sections by a central partition, with wooden benches running along the length of the structure. A metal chimney protrudes from one end, indicating the presence of a stove or heating element inside, typical of a Russian banya (sauna). The front features a large circular opening, while the rear has a smaller rectangular window and a solid end cap. The signage on the base reads 'БАНЯ-БОЧКА 4М', identifying it as a 4-meter barrel sauna.
description: A rustic, barrel-shaped wooden kiosk with a concrete base, benches inside, a metal chimney, and Russian signage, resembling a traditional sauna.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large circular wooden end, central partition, and the open entryway.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full cylindrical body, interior benches, central partition, and the 'БАНЯ-БОЧКА 4М' signage on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid circular end with a small rectangular window and the concrete base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the metal chimney, interior benches, and the open structure of the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on the concrete base, front side, with the text 'БАНЯ-БОЧКА 4М'
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular window at the rear end
attribute_door_configuration: single open archway at the front
attribute_roof_design: cylindrical barrel-shaped roof, continuous with the walls, made of wood, no overhangs or decorative elements
